title: The Weekly Challenge - 158
task1_desc: Write a script to find out all `Additive Primes <= 100`.
task1_body:
Write a script to find out all `Additive Primes <= 100`. > Additive primes are prime numbers for which the sum of their decimal digits are also primes.
### Output 2, 3, 5, 7, 11, 23, 29, 41, 43, 47, 61, 67, 83, 89
task2_desc: Write a script to compute first series `Cuban Primes <= 1000`. Please refer [**wikipedia page**](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cuban_prime) for more informations.
task2_body:
Write a script to compute first series `Cuban Primes <= 1000`. Please refer [**wikipedia page**](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cuban_prime) for more informations. ### Output 7, 19, 37, 61, 127, 271, 331, 397, 547, 631, 919.
Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 3rd April 2022**.
